title: PAU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Fellow Posts
description: The Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Fellow Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc., M.Sc., and Ph.D. can apply for the PAU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection process, applicatio...
